title: n8n Course Level 1
desc: Introduction to n8n basics, including Editor UI navigation, data structures, node configuration, and workflow automation.

title: n8n Course Level 2
desc: Advanced n8n training covering complex business processes, data type processing, JavaScript functions, and error handling.

title: PMP Basics
desc: Foundational course on Project Management Professional (PMP) basics, demonstrating commitment to professional skill advancement.

title: Prompt Engineering with GitHub Copilot
desc: Training on effective prompt engineering techniques to optimize the use of GitHub Copilot for code generation and development tasks.
